title: iamfine-mono-repo
description: Multi-language on-premise RAG chatbot system with admin management interface. Features a Qwen2.5-7B-based RAG engine, FastAPI backend, React admin dashboard, and Docker Compose deployment — all running 100% on-premise with no external API dependencies.
features: Qwen2.5-7B 기반 RAG 챗봇 엔진 (100% 오픈소스)
Qdrant 벡터 DB + BM25 하이브리드 검색
PaddleOCR 기반 문서 스캔 및 텍스트 추출
shortDescription: On-premise RAG chatbot with multi-language support and admin dashboard

title: bridgeui
description: A desktop application for data processing and visualization built with Electron and React
features: React Hook Form + Zod 폼 검증
shortDescription: Electron 기반 데스크톱 데이터 처리 및 시각화 앱

title: vemontes
description: Full-stack subscription management e-commerce platform with web admin dashboard (Next.js), REST API server (Spring Boot/Kotlin), and cross-platform mobile app (Flutter). Features subscription lifecycle management, delivery tracking, admin analytics, and SMS notifications.
features: 구독 상태 관리 시스템 (ACTIVE, PAUSED, CANCELLED)
JWT 기반 인증 및 역할 기반 접근 제어
Flutter 기반 iOS/Android 크로스플랫폼 모바일 앱
shortDescription: Subscription management platform with web admin, REST API, and mobile app
